expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体板材的尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม [BoardThick] เป็นความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] เป็นความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng board para sa isang cabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်သုံးကယ်ဘိနက်စာမျက်နှာအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။[Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ဖုံး၊ အောက်ဖုံးနှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်အဖုံးများ၏ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံသစ်သား၏အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាគុណភាពបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាចំនុះសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះលើ ក្រោម និងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄຳນວນຂະໜາດໃບສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ,[BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸໃບຂອງເທິງ, ຂ້າງລຸ່ມ ແລະຂ້າງ,[BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸໃບພື້ນຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法、 [BoardThick]は上板、下板、側板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は裏板の材料厚さです。（AI翻訳済、確認してください）
remarks.ko: 캐비닛을 위한 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이고, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측판 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 뒷판 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieur, inférieur et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke für Ober-, Unter- und Seitenbretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke des Rückwandbretts. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых панелей, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
